name: ExecuteTransaction
businessLogic: Delegate to ProcessCommandToExternalSystem.processEachEvent(slotsDTO) to perform the composable-tm external call.
If an FbpApplicationException is thrown and limit reversal is enabled, initiate limit reversal.
Read externalReferenceIds from slots using DDLCConstants.LIMIT_EXTERNAL_REF_IDS; if absent or empty, log a warning and skip reversal.
Read txnDate from slots using DDLCConstants.LIMIT_REVERSAL_TXN_DATE as BusinessDateDTO.
Delegate to LimitReversalServiceUtil.reverse() with requestContext, externalRefIds, and txnDate to reverse consumed operational limits.
Always re-throw the original FbpApplicationException to preserve the existing rejection/HTTP-error handling flow.
